league_table.description: 24-team league table with position, P/W/D/L, GF/GA/GD, Pts, form (last 5)
league_table.notes: Always visible on Command Centre. Highlight player's club row.

squad_audit_table.description: Player roster with name, position, rating, wage, stats

player_card.description: Individual player detail — name, position, rating, age, morale, stats, wage
player_card.notes: Shown on hover/click from squad table

data_tile.description: Key stat with label, value, and sparkline/trend arrow
data_tile.notes: Grid of tiles across top of Command Centre

budget_dashboard.description: Transfer budget remaining, weekly wage bill, income/outgoings

news_ticker.description: Scrolling or stacked feed of partial headlines about club progress, signings, fan sentiment
examples: FANS BUZZING after back-to-back wins lift club to...
NEW SIGNING: Manager swoops for midfielder in £120k...
CONCERN as defensive record slips to worst in...
news_ticker.notes: Partial headlines create intrigue. Tapping expands to full story in Social Feed.

chat_bubble.description: NPC message bubble (left-aligned) and player response bubble (right-aligned)

negotiation_keyboard.description: Numeric-focused input for math challenges — large number keys, operator keys, submit
negotiation_keyboard.notes: Replaces standard text input during math challenges

calculator.description: Floating calculator widget on side of chat screen
calculator.trigger: Appears automatically for certain question types, or on request
calculator.notes: Basic operations only: +, -, ×, ÷, %. Not a cheat — a tool.

math_challenge_card.description: Structured problem display within chat — question, input field, hint button, submit
math_challenge_card.notes: Glows when active. Shows difficulty tier via subtle indicator.

hint_system.description: Progressive hints: 1st wrong = retry, 2nd = conceptual hint, 3rd = step-by-step, 4th = walkthrough
hint_system.notes: Delivered as NPC chat messages to feel natural

stadium.description: Central stadium building with 4 modular stands (N/S/E/W)
stadium.notes: Visual upgrade per level (scaffolding → basic → covered → modern → premium)

restaurant.description: Matchday hospitality / restaurant facilities — revenue stream

isometric_blueprint.notes: Each building clickable. Click opens Blueprint Slide-over with upgrade cost, ROI calculation (math challenge), and visual preview of next level.

isometric_tile.description: Small tile on Command Centre showing miniature isometric view
isometric_tile.behaviour: Glows when facility upgrade available. Click opens Isometric Blueprint as slide-over.

social_tile.description: Small tile on Command Centre showing latest chat preview / notification count
social_tile.behaviour: Glows when unread events/negotiations. Click opens Social Feed as slide-over.

slide_over.description: Full-height panel sliding in from the right, overlaying the Command Centre
slide_over.close: X button or click outside to return to Command Centre
slide_over.backdrop: Command Centre dims but remains partially visible

week_advance_button.description: Primary action button to advance to next week

states.blocked: Disabled — pending events must be dealt with first
